title: Skill Lifecycle: Distilling & Publishing
description: Distill learned capsule behaviors into skills via skillDistiller, publish to Hub via skillPublisher, manage learning curriculum, and apply updates via SkillUpdater.

actors.name: GEP Engine
actors.description: The evolution system that drives distillation; reads capsules/genes/events from GEP_ASSETS_DIR

actors.name: LLM Service
actors.description: AI model that synthesizes a Gene JSON from the distillation prompt

actors.name: Skill Hub
actors.description: Remote REST API at /a2a/skill/store; stores and serves published skills

actors.name: Agent Proxy
actors.description: SkillUpdater running inside the proxy; polls for incoming skill updates and applies them

actors.name: Developer / Admin
actors.description: Controls SKILL_DISTILLER env var and hub connection settings; triggers manual workflows

use_cases.name: Check Distillation Eligibility
use_cases.description: shouldDistill() checks: SKILL_DISTILLER!=false, successCapsules >= threshold, cooldown interval elapsed, data hash changed

use_cases.name: Collect Distillation Data
use_cases.description: collectDistillationData() reads capsules.json, events.jsonl; filters success capsules (score>=threshold); groups by gene id

use_cases.name: Analyze Patterns
use_cases.description: analyzePatterns(data) detects high_frequency groups (count>=5), strategy_drift (summary divergence), coverage_gaps from events

use_cases.name: Prepare Distillation Request
use_cases.description: prepareDistillation() builds LLM prompt via buildDistillationPrompt(analysis, genes, caps); writes promptPath + DistillationRequest JSON; returns {ok, promptPath, requestPath, input_capsule_count}

use_cases.name: Build Distillation Prompt
use_cases.description: buildDistillationPrompt(analysis, genes, caps) generates instructional LLM prompt requesting gene_distilled_ output with forbidden_paths, strategy, signals_match

use_cases.name: Synthesize Gene via LLM
use_cases.description: LLM receives the distillation prompt and returns a Gene JSON object (type:Gene, id:gene_distilled_*, category, signals_match, strategy, constraints)

use_cases.name: Complete Distillation
use_cases.description: completeDistillation(llmResponse) extracts Gene JSON via extractJsonFromLlmResponse(); validates via validateSynthesizedGene(); saves to genes.json; updates distiller state (last_distillation_at, distillation_count)

use_cases.name: Validate Synthesized Gene
use_cases.description: validateSynthesizedGene(gene, existing) checks: id has DISTILLED_ID_PREFIX, strategy present, signals_match present, no full overlap with existing, deduplicates id on conflict, strips unsafe validation cmds, caps max_files to DISTILLED_MAX_FILES

use_cases.name: Auto Distill (Heuristic, No LLM)
use_cases.description: autoDistill() runs full distillation pipeline locally using synthesizeGeneFromPatterns() — no LLM needed; reads top-performing capsule group and builds gene from aggregated signals/strategy

use_cases.name: Synthesize Gene From Patterns
use_cases.description: synthesizeGeneFromPatterns(data, analysis, genes) creates a gene_distilled_ entry from high-frequency capsule group: aggregates signals_match, selects dominant category, assigns strategy steps from existing gene

use_cases.name: Publish Skill to Hub
use_cases.description: publishSkillToHub(gene, opts) converts gene → SKILL.md; POSTs to /a2a/skill/store/publish with {sender_id, skill_id, content, category, tags}; on 409 conflict calls updateSkillOnHub()

use_cases.name: Update Existing Skill on Hub
use_cases.description: updateSkillOnHub(nodeId, skillId, content, opts, gene) PUTs to /a2a/skill/store/update with changelog:'Iterative evolution update'
use_cases.method: updateSkillOnHub(nodeId, skillId, content, opts, gene) → Promise<{ok, result|error}>

use_cases.name: Convert Gene to Skill.md
use_cases.description: geneToSkillMd(gene) produces marketplace-quality SKILL.md with frontmatter (name, description), sections: When to Use, Trigger Signals, Preconditions, Strategy (bolded verbs), Constraints, Validation, Metadata, ESL-1.0 license footer

use_cases.name: Manage Curriculum
use_cases.description: curriculum.js (obfuscated) manages learning agenda: tracks curriculum_target, scores items by priority, updates timestamps, manages what gets distilled next; exposes curriculum config API
use_cases.method: curriculum API (obfuscated) — manages items with scoring, timestamps, priority ordering

use_cases.name: Poll and Apply Skill Update
use_cases.description: SkillUpdater.pollAndApply() calls store.poll() for pending updates; for each message calls processSkillUpdate(message) then store.ack()

use_cases.name: Process Skill Update
use_cases.description: SkillUpdater.processSkillUpdate(message) backs up existing skill.md (copyFileSync), writes new skill content (writeFileSync), calls store.setState, logs the update

use_cases.name: Configure Skill Path
use_cases.description: SkillUpdater.setSkillPath(filePath) sets the target skill.md file path for the agent

relationships: GEP Engine --> UC01: Check Distillation Eligibility
GEP Engine --> UC02: Collect Distillation Data
GEP Engine --> UC04: Prepare Distillation Request
GEP Engine --> UC11: Publish Skill to Hub
LLM Service --> UC06: Synthesize Gene via LLM
Agent Proxy --> UC15: Poll and Apply Skill Update
Developer / Admin --> UC17: Configure Skill Path
Skill Hub --> UC11: receives published skills
UC06 ..depends.. UC04: LLM reads promptPath output
UC07 ..depends.. UC06: receives LLM response text

key_data_models.Gene: { type:'Gene', id:'gene_distilled_*', category, signals_match:[], strategy:[], constraints:{max_files, forbidden_paths}, preconditions?, validation?, summary?, schema_version }
key_data_models.Capsule: { type:'Capsule', id, gene:string, trigger:[], summary, outcome:{status, score} }
key_data_models.SKILL.md: frontmatter(name,description) + When to Use + Trigger Signals + Preconditions + Strategy + Constraints + Validation + Metadata + ESL-1.0 footer

distillation_conditions: data hash changed since last distillation (idempotency guard)
important_notes: skillDistiller.js and curriculum.js are JavaScript-obfuscated (hex function names, single-line minified). skillPublisher.js is plain readable. SkillUpdater is a class in src/proxy/extensions/skillUpdater.js. publishSkillToHub uses a2aProtocol for hub URL and auth headers. On 409 (duplicate skill id), it automatically falls back to updateSkillOnHub with changelog. Skill IDs are prefixed 'skill_' + sanitized gene name. autoDistill runs without LLM using synthesizeGeneFromPatterns as a heuristic fallback.
source_files_analyzed: src/gep/skillDistiller.js (obfuscated, API inferred from test file)
